subcodes.first_line: O thou who holdest fast to the Covenant and Testament of the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name—may my spirit be a sacrifice for His loved ones—most glorious effulgence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بعهد و میثاق جمال قدم و اسم اعظم روحی لاحبائه الفدا اعظم اشراق و
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
